content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 22, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 22, 2026, focused on a major model cutover to Gemma 4, significant hardening of the agent orchestration and coding capabilities, and the completion of a comprehensive initiative to unify attachment and file handling across all supported platforms.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Model Cutover & Local Inference:**
    *   Transitioned the `eliza-1` local model line from Qwen to Gemma 4 end-to-end, consolidating the local stack ([#9060](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9060)).
    *   Implemented a memory validation benchmark for Eliza-1 to report host fit and footprint ([#8964](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8964)).
    *   Cleaned up legacy GGUF references and purged M8 tier artifacts ([#9064](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9064)).

*   **Unified Attachment & File Management:**
    *   Completed a multi-PR initiative to standardize file/attachment handling, including secure re-hosting, cross-connector support (Telegram, WhatsApp, Nostr, LINE, Farcaster, Slack), and inline 3D model previews ([#8876](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8876), [#8983](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8983), [#8988](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8988)).
    *   Added a dedicated Files view for CRUD operations and integrated document knowledge linkage ([#8956](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8956), [#8966](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8966)).

*   **Agent Orchestration & Supervision:**
    *   Implemented "grilling" loops where sub-agents are verified against real evidence, including Reflexion-style failure memory and automated acceptance criteria ([#8950](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8950), [#8954](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8954), [#8883](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8883)).
    *   Added multi-task supervision digests and stalled-agent watchdogs to improve swarm visibility ([#9013](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9013)).

*   **Cloud & Monetization Infrastructure:**
    *   Implemented Stripe Connect fiat payout core, including persistence layers and webhook routes ([#9041](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9041), [#9038](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9038)).
    *   Added durable per-session spend ledgers to prevent budget resets on restarts ([#9032](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9032)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#9069](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9069) [codex] fix deterministic response-handler tool calls
*   [#8976](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8976) feat(cloud): route NodeAutoscaler through ComputeProvider seam
*   [#8974](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8974) test(coding): wave 4 platform + live-model coding coverage
*   [#8972](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8972) feat(telegram): add edit_message + react_message connector capabilities
*   [#8969](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8969) feat(coding): z.ai/Moonshot quota + weeklyPct, /tasks command
*   [#8968](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8968) chore: tighten desktop build dx
*   [#8967](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8967) feat(orchestrator): TaskSupervisorService multi-task digest loop
*   [#8963](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8963) fix(core/test): update stale Stage-1 maxTokens assertion
*   [#8961](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8961) feat(workflow): add search op to WORKFLOW
*   [#8960](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8960) feat(orchestrator): auto-generate default acceptance criteria
*   [#8959](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8959) feat(workflow): EVAL_CODE action for inline sandboxed JS execution
*   [#8955](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8955) test(coding): wave 3 coding-capability coverage
*   [#8953](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8953) feat(ui): unified, configurable app background
*   [#8951](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8951) feat(cloud): route NodeAutoscaler through the ComputeProvider seam
*   [#8949](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8949) feat(telegram): edit_message + react_message connector capabilities
*   [#8948](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8948) feat(app): harden cloud desktop view routing
*   [#8947](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8947) fix(core): stop direct-reply fast path re-answering an earlier message
*   [#8945](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8945) test(scenario-runner): coding-orchestration finalChecks
*   [#8874](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8874) chore: post-audit cleanup
*   [#8873](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8873) fix(orchestrator): reliable sub-agent coding results
*   [#8872](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8872) fix(core): strip leaked model tool-call markup
*   [#8871](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8871) fix(agent): default a browser User-Agent on guarded HTTP GETs
*   [#8858](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8858) Fix/8810 handoff closeout

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No specific issue numbers were provided in the input as closed; however, multiple PRs explicitly closed tracked issues (e.g., [#9060](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9060) closed #8808, [#9040](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9040) closed #8921, [#9032](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9032) closed #8924).*
